title: Trident Protection Measures│三叉戟保護機制
description: When a trident with the Loyalty enchantment falls into the void, it will trigger the Return effect and return to the one who fired the trident.│當帶有忠誠附魔的三叉戟落入虛空中時，它將觸發折返效果並回到發射者手上。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
- Specifically, a trident with the loyalty enchantment will trigger the return effect when it is at y < -96 in the Overworld, or at y < -32 in the Nether or the End.│具體來說，當帶有忠誠附魔的三叉戟在主世界位於 y < -96 處，或在下界或末地位於 y < -32 處時，將會觸發折返效果。
- This data pack prevents the trident from accidentally falling into the void when fighting the ender dragon through the trident.│這個資料包避免了透過三叉戟與末影龍做戰時三叉戟意外掉入虛空的問題。
